The error items for 15.57 MeV were given

Surface source correction 0.8 for In,  0.8 for Al
Self-absorption correction 0.4 for In, 0.4 for Al
Decay branch ratio         1.2 for In, 0.1 for Al
Decay constant            0.02 for In, 0.4 for Al
Amount of nuclei         0.1  for In, 0.1  for Al
